zoo.website.gametour.0:
Welcome to the totally crazy zoo game Zoomumba! My name is Zoey and I'll be your guide through this game.

You can buy animal habitats in the shop and then place them on your zoo to have them built.
zoo.website.gametour.1:
Click on the habitat and then buy an animal. Make sure to specify whether you want a male or female animal.

Once you have both male and female animals in your exhibit, they can have baby animals!
zoo.website.gametour.2: Take care of your animals and give them what they need to make them happy. Go ahead, give it a try!
zoo.website.gametour.3: Connect your animal habitats and attractions with pathways, so that your visitors can walk around and see the park.
zoo.website.gametour.4: The shop is your one-stop store for everything: meat, fruit, grass - you name it, they've got it!
zoo.website.gametour.5:
From level 2 on, you can also buy buildings and booths in the shop. These items will increase the popularity of your zoo.

Profits made from the sale of admission tickets can be picked up at the zoo entrance.
zoo.website.gametour.6:
The more visitors who come to your zoo, the more garbage will be generated.

Keep your zoo clean and your visitors happy by picking up the litter!
zoo.website.gametour.7:
The happier your visitors are, the better your rating on the Zoo-O-Meter will be.

Build the best zoo of all time. Have fun!
zoo.website.regText:
This zoo's gone wild!

Create your own online zoo filled with exotic animals and fun attractions:

  • Enjoy tons of wacky wildlife
  • Attract visitors to your zoo with food stands and other decorations
  • Turn your zoo into a beautiful park and watch your Zoo-O-Meter soar

Take good care of your animals and make your zoo famous around the world!

Good times are guaranteed - play now!
zoo.website.terms: Terms & Conditions and Data Privacy Policy read and accepted

zoo.website.seo.description: Online Games for animal lovers | Zoomumba is an online zoo with zany animals and amazing attractions. Play now and turn your zoo into the #1 animal kingdom!
